description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.2 Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a job named production that runs only on the master branch. In its before_script run `apt-get update -y && apt-get install rsync openssh-client -y`, start the ssh-agent, add the `$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY` with `ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY")`, create `~/.ssh`, and write the provided host keys to `~/.ssh/known_hosts`. In the script install Jekyll with `gem install jekyll`, build the site with `jekyll build`, and deploy the generated `_site/` directory via `rsync -av _site/ deployer@cachoeira.kroehling.de:/usr/share/nginx/html/www.qaclana.io/`. Publish the `public/` directory as an artifact and ensure the job belongs to the deploy stage.
